lines.lyrics: Lady in the stars
Telling stories of eternal life and the flow of light
An early message from the hidden birds that speak
Tiny hints and take their flight
But it's so far away, a needle in the hay
Buried deep inside the day
A broken wishing well is where my money dwells
I think I need another way
The cards are down, no standing around
Waiting for your time to set fire to the town
I'm back from yesterday
Little times we strained our eyes while looking in the sun
You won't find what you want if you don't open up
And take it in once it's begun
I'm trying to give some back, I'm picking up my slack
It's buried deep inside facts
The world spins endlessly, the birds are flying free
The day is what it's supposed to be
The cards are down, no standing around
Waiting for your time to set fire to the town
You can wake up early in the morning
Even give yourself a warning, get yourself together the day is dawning
It's time for us to get together
And get the wheels rolling
